productName: Seattle Bubble Works Joint - DOH Medical: Hash Pre-Rolls - Wedding Cake (I)
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Wedding Cake and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, pepper, and butter, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
